items.name: Visual Translate by Vozo
items.tagline: Translate text in your videos without recreating visuals
items.description: Fully translated videos — finally. Visual Translate adds the final layer — translating text inside videos — on top of voice dubbing, lip-sync, and subtitles. It detects and translates on-screen text, from slides and diagrams to callouts and labels, while preserving the original layout, style, and animation. Turn slide videos and explainers into multilingual versions and reach a global audience — without recreating visuals from scratch.

items.name: Chronicle 2.0
items.tagline: AI presentations without the AI slop
items.description: Chronicle is your AI-powered design partner for presentations. Turn notes, prompts, or existing decks into beautiful, on-brand slides in minutes. It asks a few questions, builds an impressive first draft, and lets you refine slides through conversation.

items.name: Claude Code Review
items.tagline: Multi-agent review catching bugs early in AI-generated code
items.description: Claude Code now dispatches a team of agents on every PR to catch bugs that skims miss. Available in research preview for Team and Enterprise. It is an AI-powered multi-agent code review that analyzes every pull request like an expert team. It detects bugs, security issues, and hidden logic flaws in AI-generated code, verifies findings to reduce false positives, and delivers high-signal feedback before code reaches production.

items.name: Your Next Store
items.tagline: AI-first platform for building commerce stores, fast
items.description: YNS is an opinionated commerce stack for agencies and software teams building design-forward brands. You can create a store by chatting with AI but the real advantage is the foundation: well-modeled commerce primitives exposed through API. Each store is a structured, Stripe-native, production-ready Next.js app that plugs into AI workflows (Codex, Claude Code), with full code ownership when needed. Commerce rebuilt for the agentic future, where agents build, reason about, and operate commerce.

items.name: Fish Audio S2
items.description: We've open-sourced Fish Audio S2, a new generation of expressive TTS that lets you direct voices with natural language. Add cues like [whisper] or [laughing nervously], generate multi-speaker dialogue in one pass, and create scary-real voices across 80+ languages.

items.name: sitefire.ai
items.tagline: Marketing suite for the agentic web
items.description: sitefire (YC W26) is the marketing suite for the agentic web. We don't just monitor - we act: sitefire agents analyze what content drives citations, write brand-aware articles, and push to your CMS (Framer, Webflow). sitefire agents also surface PR outlets and UGC that influences AI answers, and provide tailor-made outreach suggestions. Save yourself a SEO and content person, and use sitefire to start marketing to agents.

items.name: New Macaly Agent
items.tagline: Nobody tells you what you can ask AI to build
items.description: The Macaly agent can do much more than most people realize. So we’re showing 15 things you can ask it to do, like generate a landing page from a YouTube video, redesign a website from a URL, turn a spreadsheet into a dashboard, set up a database, add authentication and user roles, add AI features to your app, and much more.

items.name: Spine Swarm
items.tagline: Manage a team of AI agents that do real work
items.description: With Spine, you can manage and deploy swarms of AI agents that complete complex tasks from start to finish. Agents browse the web, conduct deep research, build 50-page strategy documents, generate detailed presentations, create interactive prototypes, and more — all with one prompt. The result: Auditable work on a visual canvas that’s far more thorough, accurate, and complete than what you get from ChatGPT, Gemini, or Claude.

items.name: Agent Skills
items.tagline: Find skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot & more
items.description: Largest cross-platform directory of AI agent skills. 100K+ skills, 30+ platforms, security audits on every listing. One search, every platform.

items.name: Sonarly
items.tagline: The AI that fixes prod autonomously
items.description: Connect Sentry, Datadog, or any monitoring tool. Sonarly's agents triage your alerts, deduplicate the noise, and fix bugs with full context of your production system. Autonomously! Most monitoring tools tell you what broke. Sonarly tells you why, groups the duplicates, and hands you a production-aware PR with evidence. Powered by Claude Code and Opus 4.6 with deep production context by Sonarly.

I paid for the year believing that this app would clean up my tablet and help it run smoother so to speak. It claims that it will help improve the battery life as well as clean up the pictures and it’s done nothing. 
Please return my money.

Stole money from me
Have to wait for apple to sort that out now
Strange how this App is the one that you are directed to by a virus scam.
So difficult to cancel the subscription it forces you to pay for
